best_for: nuanced code review and final-pass editing
avoid: high-volume simple tasks where cost dominates
trivial extraction or formatting better given to Haiku

prompting.responds_best_to: Clear goals plus context and constraints, then trust it to reason. Handles open-ended work without heavy step-by-step scaffolding.
prompting.avoid: Over-constraining with rigid step lists suppresses its judgment; redundant repetition only wastes context.

quirks: Flags flawed premises instead of complying blindly, so it surfaces bad task framing early
Strong self-critic; the best final reviewer in a multi-model pipeline
Can be verbose unless told to be concise

handoff.output_format_instruction: Ask for explicit structure (fenced code blocks, headed sections); it adheres exactly.
handoff.evaluation_notes: Output is reliable; main risk is over-thoroughness and scope expansion. Confirm it stayed within the requested task.
